title: ‘Everest season has gotten off to a terrible start’ worries ‘Into Thin Air’ scribe Jon Krakauer
description: It's been 30 years since Krakauer survived one of the mountain's worst disasters.
content:
• Jon Krakauer, 30 years after surviving Everests deadliest day, still worries about the climbing season.

de: „Die Everest-Saison hatte einen schrecklichen Start“, beunruhigt „Into Thin Air“-Autor Jon Krakauer. Es ist 30 Jahre her, dass Krakauer eine der schlimmsten Katastrophen des Berges überlebt hat.

title: How Everest Has Changed Since Into Thin Air
description: Scaling the world’s highest mountain is a very different experience than it was when I climbed it.
content: When the first edition of Into Thin Air was published not long after the 1996 Mount Everest calamity, during which eight climbers died in a violent storm, I assumed that the disturbing events I descr… [+11656 chars]
de: Wie sich der Everest seitdem in Luft aufgelöst hat. Die Besteigung des höchsten Berges der Welt ist ein ganz anderes Erlebnis als damals, als ich ihn bestiegen habe.
en: How Everest Has Changed Since Into Thin Air. Scaling the world’s highest mountain is a very different experience than it was when I climbed it.
la: Quomodo Everestus mutavit cum in tenues auras. Altissimus mons mundi scandere longe alia experientia est quam cum eum ascendi.
